appraisal_events.evidence: « Malheureusement dans l'intervalle il a fait lui-même un mariage encore beaucoup plus étonnant... Placée entre le renoncement aux promenades botaniques et l'obligation de fréquenter une personne déshonorante, j'ai choisi la première de ces deux calamités. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duchess presents Swann's marriage as socially dishonorable and announces that she avoids him because of this union, which depreciates Swann by association with his wife and marks a refusal to socialize with him.

status_effects.explanation: Swann is locally excluded from the duchess's circle, who declares she will stop seeing him due to his marriage deemed dishonorable.
